domain: Saguaro cactus pleated-rib expansion — vertical accordion pleats allow 20-25% volume swell on water uptake without stretching skin; contraction on water depletion.
specific_mechanism: Pre-folded reserve geometry that swells and contracts in a binary cycle without architectural change.
llm_application: ACCORDION-PARAM: pretraining with K pre-folded zero-initialized 'pleat' parameter groups in the base model. On data-pressure pulse, pleats unfold (gradients flow to them); on plateau, pleats contract (L1 prune back to near-zero). Binary swell-contract data-driven capacity adjustment without architectural change.
novelty_claim: Weight factorization + gradient compression reduce static capacity. Model growth / progressive layer addition expands monotonically. ACCORDION-PARAM differs by PRE-FOLDED zero-init reserve capacity with binary expand-contract under data pressure — saguaro-style rather than monotonic growth.
